CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2021 Continued To Sep-29-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. TAYLOR J. POHLE, Esq. of Collins + Collins LLP (Tel: 626-243-1100) for defendant Cahill Contractors LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CAHILL CONTRACTORS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Cahill Contractors, LLC's demurrer to the complaint is sustained with 30 days leave to amend. Plaintiff has not established standing to bring a survival action because she did not file a declaration as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 377.32. Moreover, even liberally construing the complaint, it does not state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action against Cahill.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
